stemHtml: During the cruise in an active convective area, the air traffic controller passes a report from an aeroplane ahead that they have recently passed through a zone of intense ice crystal concentrations. The reporting aeroplane is at a similar flight level and following the same route as the aeroplane behind. What possible hazard might this pose for the crew of the jet aeroplane behind as they half through the same area?

options.a: Heavy mixed ice on the forward-facing parts of the airframe.
options.b: Formation of clear ice on the forward windscreens.
options.c: Radio signal and navigational system errors.
